zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Eames於1659年4月4日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本時，她的父親Robert Eames31歲，母親Elizabeth Andrews27歲。她於1682年5月11日與John Eames在美國麻薩諸塞州米德萊可黑爾波恩結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1727年6月26日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可福拉米加姆享年68歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可羅威爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Eames于1659年4月4日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本时，她的父亲Robert Eames31岁，母亲Elizabeth Andrews27岁。她于1682年5月11日与John Eames在美国马萨诸塞州米德萊可黑爾波恩结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1727年6月26日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可福拉米加姆享年68岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可羅威爾。

nameMeanings.name: Eames
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English eme, eim ‘uncle’ (Old English ēam). Most of the modern variants of the surname have post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Eames was born on 4 April 1659, in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Robert Eames, was 31 and her mother, Elizabeth Andrews, was 27. She married John Eames on 11 May 1682, in Sherborn, Middlesex, Massachusetts, United States. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 26 June 1727, in Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 68, and was buried in Lowell, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Eames est née le 4 avril 1659, à Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Robert Eames, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Andrews, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé John Eames le 11 mai 1682, à Sherborn, Middlesex, Massachusetts, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 26 juin 1727, à Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterrée à Lowell, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Eames am 4. April 1659 in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Eames 31 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Andrews 27. Sie hat am 11. Mai 1682 in Sherborn, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten John Eames geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 26. Juni 1727 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Lowell, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Eames è nata il il 4 aprile 1659 nel Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, Robert Eames, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Andrews, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato John Eames il 11 maggio 1682, nel Sherborn, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 26 giugno 1727, nel Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolta a Lowell, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Eamesが1659年4月4日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスウオブルンで生まれた時，父Robert Eamesは31歳，母Elizabeth Andrewsは27歳であった。1682年5月11日にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ミッドレセックスシェルボルンでJohn Eamesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1727年6月26日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスフラミンガムで68歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスロウエルにて埋葬された。

ko.Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 프램잉함

ko.Lowell, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Col: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 로월
ko.Sherborn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay,: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 셔본
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Eames(이)가 1659년 4월 4일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Eames(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Andrews(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1682년 5월 11일 미국 매사추세츠 주 미들레세스 셔본에서 John Eames(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1727년 6월 26일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 프램잉함에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 로월에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Eames nasceu em 4 de abril de 1659, em Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Robert Eames, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Andrews, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com John Eames em 11 de maio de 1682, em Sherborn, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 26 de junho de 1727, em Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 68 anos, e foi sepultada em Lowell, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Eames родилась 4 апреля 1659 г. в местности вобурн, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Robert Eames было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Andrews, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Eames 11 мая 1682 г. в местности ширборн, миддлесекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 26 июня 1727 г. в местности фрамингхам, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 68 лет и была похоронена в местности лоуелл, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Eames nació el 4 de abril de 1659, en Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Robert Eames, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Andrews, tenía 27 años. Se casó con John Eames el 11 de mayo de 1682, en Sherborn, Middlesex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 26 de junio de 1727, en Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultada en Lowell, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
